title: Wasteland Refabricated
description: Datapack remake of the 1.12.2 'Wasteland Reborn' mod to support a wide range of modern vanilla (or modded) versions!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qqY00UTkBxc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# **Wasteland Refabricated**
You spawn in a bunker after some apocalypse.\
When surfacing, you are greeted by barren wastes, leafless trees and ruined buildings scattered around you.\
The sky is gray, and in some places ash still dwells in the air.

Zombies are able to spawn during daylight.\
There are absolutely no surface plants. Good luck finding grass (It is available).

The datapack supports the Travelers' Backpack mod, I might add some more in the future.

A datapack based on Wasteland Reborn, a 1.12.2 Mod.\
Link: [Wasteland Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wasteland-reborn)\
Also heavily inspired by TheWaffleGalaxy's End Of Earth Series:\
Link: [End Of Earth Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kVYAbWqCLgQ&list=PL-JPD8A3qWVMvhIO6hc9cLeUisTU3GeOx)

Terrain generation and structures are not copies, they are made by me, Cleeuwen05.
## **Roadmap**
### Better abandoned infrastructure
- Think Lost Cities but worse
- More scattered houses
- Military Structures
- Camps?
- Structures where items unobtainable (no vanilla biomes) would be obtained

### More Biomes
- Desert
- Forests (No leaves)
- Lava pool biome
- A frozen biome (Ice is otherwise unobtainable)

### Real Time Meteors? 
(Hard to implement because I do not want to destroy player-built structures)
- Sound effect
- Meteor structure

### Advancements
- Custom advancements for obtaining grass,\
 killing passive mobs or exploring biomes.

### Configuration
- Day Zombie spawn times
- Spawn in bunker
- On/Off for supported mods.

## Developer
**Cleeuwen05**
